statement: In every magma, Equation 2028 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (w * u)`) implies Equation 2926 (`x = ((y * (x * z)) * y) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0089
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op w u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x z)) y) w)
